author: crispypata
title: Added Pagination
content:
I've currently added some new pagination functionality once the page has reach the view limit per page

The setup is 4 blog entries per page. Once it has reached 5 items, then it will generate to a new page.

I'm not sure how long this architechture works when I reach more that 10 pages. I'll need to add a functionality on my pagination class

to add an ellipsis in between number.


I'll generate another blog to see if the functionality works. In the meantime, This page still remains broken.
